slogan.const: Every Affair Has a Story. Some End in Murder.

voice_id.description: Jimmy - Canadian Podcast Narration (male, Canadian accent, formal, narrative_story use-case). Verified via live TTS test 2026-07-19 — the MCP tool's silent default produced a female voice, which is wrong for this channel, so voice_id must always be passed explicitly.

voice_model.description: Stable long-form narration without emotion tags, per this channel's voiceover policy — see Agents/voice_production_agent.md.

publishing_pace.description: Encodes the channel owner's own release strategy — see fatal-affairs-project-brief.md

shorts.description: See Agents/shorts_agent.md — decided 2026-07-19 after real 2026 completion-rate/view-count research (5,400-Short sample), not a guess.

max_seconds.description: Hard cap, not a range. 30-45s is the actual sweet spot for total views + algorithm weighting per 2026 data — shorter caps win on completion % alone but lose on raw views/rewatch signal.

caption_font.description: Reuses the channel's existing body font (see channel.fonts.body) rather than introducing a new one, for brand consistency.

caption_highlight_color.description: Reuses the channel's existing accent color (see channel.colors.accent) for the word-by-word karaoke highlight, instead of the generic yellow default seen elsewhere in the genre.
